name: Uponor Smatrix Base Pulse Underfloor Heating
description: The Uponor Smatrix component allows you to integrate an Uponor Smatrix Base Pulse underfloor heating control system in ESPHome without the need for an Smatrix Pulse Com R-208 communication module. It directly communicates with the controller and thermostats via the RS485 thermostat bus.

config_entries.label: UART ID
config_entries.description: Manually specify the ID of the [UART Component](https://esphome.io/components/uart) if you want to use multiple UART buses.

config_entries.label: Time ID
config_entries.description: Specify the ID of the [Time Component](https://esphome.io/components/time/) to use as the time source if you want ESPHome to automatically synchronize the date and time of the thermostats.

config_entries.label: Time Device Address
config_entries.description: The 32 bit device address of the thermostat that keeps the system time. This will be automatically detected from the bus if not specified. It needs to be the device address of the first thermostat that was paired to the controller, and the one where you can manually change the date and time via the buttons on the thermostat.
